profile.name: Bilal Sattar
profile.title: Full-Stack Developer
profile.bio: Full-stack developer and Tech Operations Lead with a track record of building products that serve millions of users. Creator of SportsWZRD, a platform with 10K+ active users grown through organic marketing and strategic partnerships. Currently leading tech operations at a leading software distributor, managing tens of millions of software downloads and developing innovative monetization solutions for Chrome extensions.

featuredProject.name: Fantasy Basketball WZRD
featuredProject.description: Chrome extension serving 10,000+ active users with advanced analytics and automation for fantasy basketball enthusiasts.

skills.title: Technical Expertise
skills.subtitle: Mastering cutting-edge technologies to deliver exceptional digital experiences

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: Showcasing innovative solutions that drive real business impact

items.title: Fantasy Basketball WZRD
items.description: Chrome extension serving 10,000+ active users with advanced analytics and automation. Built and operate the entire business: product development, customer support, business operations, financial management, and infrastructure scaling.

items.title: SportsWZRD Platform
items.description: SaaS platform for fantasy basketball analytics on the go. Built and operate the entire business: product development, customer support, business operations, financial management, and infrastructure scaling.

items.title: Hit Factory LA
items.description: Full-featured WordPress website for a multi-sport training facility. Built a high-converting reservation system for batting cages, indoor soccer, basketball courts, and banquet areas. Includes e-commerce for merchandise, training class bookings, and youth baseball team management.

items.title: Sports Health Tech Platform
items.description: AI-powered risk analysis platform for professional athletes. Analyzes game and practice film to help teams make informed decisions on player health management. Lead frontend development while contributing to product strategy, infrastructure decisions, and architecture design.

items.title: Extension Ad Platform
items.description: First-of-its-kind advertising platform for Chrome extension developers. Built and operate the entire business: product development, customer support, business operations, financial management, and infrastructure scaling.

items.name: Sarah Johnson
items.text: Bilal delivered exceptional results on our enterprise platform. His technical expertise and leadership skills are outstanding. The project was completed ahead of schedule with zero critical bugs.

items.name: Michael Chen
items.text: Working with Bilal was a game-changer for our startup. He not only built an incredible product but also mentored our junior developers. His code quality is impeccable.

items.name: Emily Rodriguez
items.text: Bilal transformed our vision into reality with his full-stack expertise. The Fantasy Basketball WZRD extension he built has been a massive success with our users loving every feature.
